Additional test notes:

## Screenshots or recordings (if UI changed)

Attach before/after screenshots or a short video.

## Privacy and trust review

- [ ] This change preserves local-first behavior by default
- [ ] This change does not introduce misleading file-access or data-collection claims
- [ ] This change does not upload file contents
- [ ] Any metadata handling changes are documented
- [ ] Any changes to scanning permissions or behavior are clearly explained

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I kept this PR focused and reviewable
- [ ] I updated docs where needed
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I considered accessibility and usability impact
